remarks: Welcome to this bright and versatile upstairs apartment in a convenient Stamford location near the Home Depot area. Offering a flexible floor plan, this home can be configured as either a spacious 3-bedroom or an oversized 2-bedroom with a separate living room or dining room to suit your needs. Please note that when used as a 3-bedroom, the unit does not include a traditional living room.  Parking & Convenience: The property includes 2 private backyard parking spaces, with enough room to accommodate larger trucks or work vans. Additional parking may be available upon request.  Conveniently located near shopping, dining, and major highways, this apartment offers easy commuting and everyday convenience. One cat is welcome.
